description: You are a media operations specialist at a stock footage marketplace. Process the raw clips in /home/ga/Videos/raw_footage/ (aerial_landscape_001.mp4, nature_wildlife_002.mp4, urban_timelapse_003.mp4) according to the specification at /home/ga/Documents/preview_spec.txt. For each clip, generate a 720p 15-second watermarked preview video, extract a thumbnail at the 5-second mark, and create a catalog.json file with metadata for all clips. Save all 7 output files (3 preview videos, 3 thumbnails, 1 catalog JSON) to /home/ga/Videos/previews/.
